title: GEV Tail Index Analysis of the Meltome Atlas
verdict_detail: No significant Spearman rank correlation detected (rho=-0.136, p=0.658) across 13 species. Pearson r=-0.628 (p=0.022) suggests a linear trend driven by extremes. Possible explanations: measurement censoring, phylogenetic confounds, or effect too weak to detect with 13 species.
data_source: Jarzab et al. 2020, Nature Methods 17:495-503 (PRIDE: PXD011929)

figures.caption: GEV shape parameter (xi) vs optimal growth temperature across 13 species
Tm distribution fits: GEV vs normal for representative species
